text_raw: Just a moment... I have another request, if you're willing.
text_clean: Just a moment... I have another request, if you're willing.

text_raw: As you know, my domain is rather vast.
text_clean: As you know, my domain is rather vast.

text_raw: You know all too well how those wretched bandits are running wild...
text_clean: You know all too well how those wretched bandits are running wild...

text_raw: We've had no word from the southern fort in days.
text_clean: We've had no word from the southern fort in days.

text_raw: I'd like you to go and make sure that everything is in order there.
text_clean: I'd like you to go and make sure that everything is in order there.

text_raw: And it's been difficult to keep watch over everything of late.
text_clean: And it's been difficult to keep watch over everything of late.

text_raw: Those ruffians have gone too far this time.
text_clean: Those ruffians have gone too far this time.

text_raw: Did you see anything odd? I've heard they're making some kind of... medicine?
text_clean: Did you see anything odd? I've heard they're making some kind of... medicine?

text_raw: Hm... I'll have to look into that.
text_clean: Hm... I'll have to look into that.

text_raw: More importantly, I'm glad you're back safe. Thank you for all your help.
text_clean: More importantly, I'm glad you're back safe. Thank you for all your help.

text_raw: Well? Had the bandits taken my fort?
